title: telis elliptica
intro: Telis elliptica, also known as Telis elliptica, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is commonly found in tropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Telis elliptica include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various methods of consumption in traditional medicine.
